title: cenostigma pluviosum var. paraense
intro: Cenostigma pluviosum var. paraense, also known as the Paraense species of the Cenostigma pluviosum plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cenostigma pluviosum var. paraense include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
